description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a U-shaped configuration with both upper and lower cabinets, finished in a warm, medium-brown wood grain. The countertop is surfaced with a light-colored, tiled pattern and includes a double-basin stainless steel sink. The upper cabinets are wall-mounted, with paneled doors and ample storage space, while the lower cabinets include drawers and doors, some of which are shown open, revealing interior compartments. The cabinetry is designed with classic, rectangular forms and subtle decorative paneling on the doors. The handles are simple and horizontal, blending with the overall traditional style. This setup is typical for a residential kitchen, providing both storage and workspace.
description: A U-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with wood grain finish, tiled countertop, and double-basin sink, featuring both upper and lower storage cabinets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double-basin sink, tiled countertop, and both upper and lower cabinets with some doors and drawers open.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the layout of the cabinetry, the open lower cabinet doors, and the arrangement of the upper cabinets.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tiled countertop and the back sides of the upper and lower cabinets, with the sink visible from behind.
description_view_3: Side view showing the double-basin sink from above, the open upper cabinet, and the overall depth of the cabinetry.
attribute_cabinet_type: base cabinet and wall cabinet set
